rationale: Novel BRICS-recombinant scaffold (Tanimoto < 0.5 to all 2274 known); high CNN-pKd consensus across multi-mode docking; sequence-aware site-F selectivity confirmed against 16 T-box paralogs.
Z795991852-derived analog of CF Labs SPR-validated 10 µM binder. Tier-A on all 5 orthogonal signals; relaxed scaffold preserves the validated chromene-amide pharmacophore.
